descriptor_selector.index_parse_rule: exactly ten ASCII decimal digits parsed as UINT32 without sign or normalization
descriptor_selector.selection_rule: select PREPARED_UNIT.json objects[object_ordinal] after requiring array ordinal set exactly 0..M-1 and objects stored in numeric ordinal order

required_descriptor_reconciliation: selected durable_source_path equals this normalized object-member path for ATOMIC_BUNDLE_MEMBER, SINGLE_AUTHORITATIVE_FILE, or DERIVED_VIEW_TARGET
selected durable_source_path equals selected canonical_target_path for REUSE_IMMUTABLE_SOURCE
selected canonical_target_path is normalized and uniquely registered for the selected object_role
selected file_size_bytes equals exact payload byte length
selected file_sha256 equals SHA-256 of exact payload bytes
selected object_role is permitted by the frozen 30-role matrix for PREPARED_UNIT.json unit_kind
selected publication_mode is permitted by the frozen 30-role matrix for selected object_role and unit_kind
selected logical_sha256 nullability equals the frozen role-matrix rule
selected sidecar_of_object_ordinal and paired role satisfy the frozen sidecar relationship

selected_content_schema.canonical_target_compatibility_rule: match selected canonical_target_path to exactly one registered exact/dynamic canonical target grammar; require selected object_role among that grammar object_roles and selected content_schema_id among that target artifact_schema_bindings; zero, multiple, or unequal matches are invalid
selected_content_schema.resolution_rule: the exact selected content_schema_id must resolve to an existing json: or table: target in this accepted registry
